title: Rolester STAR+R Story Bank
description: Candidate-owned behavioural story bank layered over evidence.yml. Each story is a STAR+R narrative (Situation, Task, Action, Result, Reflection) that traces back to one or more evidence.yml claim ids. Stories are drafted from evidence and confirmed by the candidate — never invented. interview-prep assembles them into packets and reuses them across interview loops.

id.description: Stable slug, unique within the bank.

title.description: Short human label, e.g. "Cut dispatch latency 40%".

competencies.description: Domain-neutral behavioural themes this story demonstrates (leadership, conflict, ambiguity, measurable-impact, …). Used to match the story to behavioural questions and to compute coverage gaps.

role_signals.description: Same free-form signal vocabulary as evidence.yml claims; lets the story match a JD's signals.

reflection.description: The +R: what the candidate learned or would do differently — the part that separates a recited anecdote from a reflective answer.

evidence_ids.description: evidence.yml claim ids this story draws from. The honesty firewall: every id must resolve to a real claim, and a story with none is rejected — a story may not assert anything the evidence bank does not back.

metrics.description: Quantified results — must trace to the cited evidence claims, never invented for the narrative.

prompts.description: Example behavioural questions this story answers ("Tell me about a time you handled conflict").

landed.description: Debrief feedback: rounds/companies where this story landed well, appended by interview-prep STEP 5 so the bank compounds across loops.

open_questions.description: What context the story still needs to be its strongest — set at ingest time when a detail is missing or conflicts with the source (a metric to confirm, a concrete example, a version question). Non-empty open_questions raise a 'give me more context' action on the dashboard (mirrored into tracker.storyEnrichment) and self-clear when emptied.
